name: Mozzarella Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Make an indentation in the center of each biscuit.
2. Sprinkle with oregano.
3. Cut the mozzarella into 10 cubes, each measuring 3/4 inch; place a cube in the center of each biscuit.
4. Pinch the dough tightly around the cheese to seal.
5. Place seam side down on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Spread pizza sauce over the tops.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
